CustomField.description: used to do summation in case rollup summary fields
CustomField.formula: IF( OR(Status__c ='Closed:Pending Customer', Status__c ='Customer Hold', Status__c ='InProgress:Waiting for Customer' ), true, false)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The field would filter the records for add up time spent in the following status: In Progress:Waiting for Customer and Customer Hold and Closed:Pending Customer
CustomField.label: fxInclude In Customer Waiting
